mission: Rebuild examples/invoice-triage into a production/operational-grade example on the new pumped-fn API, including the lite core traced() dep operator (handle-shaped capability edges over ctx.exec fn-exec, exec-format options with tags; execStream variant staged).

gates: G1 example test suite green on pglite (all semantics preserved: burst-no-loss, drain-race, gated shutdown, failed-import-never-wedges, idempotent reminders, cron manual ticks, intake rejection)
G2 entrypoint end-to-end vs dockerized pg: exit 0, submitted == stored count, pending drained to 0, audit trail coherent
G3 graceful shutdown: cooperative stop, no hang, loops settle before dispose
G4 crash recovery: rows left pending by a killed process are imported by the next start
G5 traced() landed in lite: capability-record members are named exec edges, handle-shaped (.exec({params, tags})), identity types, lite suite green
G6 observability: OTel spans present for every named db.* edge, model.complete, deliver, and store step flows in one demo run (span manifest read from exporter)
G7 aggregate atomicity: pending+audit, upsert+audit, drain+audit each commit in one transaction (tested)
G8 migrations auto-run from a clean database on first resolve (pg and pglite)
G9 daemon, server, and CLI entrypoints each verified end-to-end
G10 docs complete and drift-free: example README + diagram, lite docs for traced(), lint rule docs; root pnpm lint 0
objective.read_method: gate manifest replayed per gate: test run outputs, entrypoint runs against compose pg, span export dump, psql table reads; each gate pass recorded as ledger metric_read with evidence refs

anti_goals.statement: pumped-lite-lint reports 0 diagnostics at every commit point (example, root, and any touched package); a firing rule changes the design, never gets suppressed
no memory fakes, test doubles, or test-only branches in src/ production paths; substitution happens only via preset (test seam) or role tags (production seam)
anti_goals.source_of_truth: semantic diff review + grep sweep per commit

anti_goals.statement: every effectful edge (db operation, mail delivery, model call) is a named exec-pipeline edge visible to wrapExec/OTel; no awaited foreign call outside a declared span
anti_goals.source_of_truth: pumped/no-unattributed-await lint + G6 span manifest diff

anti_goals.statement: core changes (traced()) keep lite suite and all workspace non-browser suites green; newly discovered core semantic gaps are handed back as events, never worked around silently
anti_goals.source_of_truth: pnpm -F @pumped-fn/lite test, filtered pnpm -r test, CI browser suites

anti_goals.statement: inner integrity: no bypassing, weakening, hiding, or dishonestly satisfying the anti-goal machinery

allowed: codex xhigh write-sandbox implementation inside the worktree
docker compose up/down for local pg
lite core changes for traced() and lint exemption via reviewed packets
forbidden: merging without green checks read in a separate invocation
silent workarounds of core semantic gaps
approval_gates: frame ratification before further state-changing moves
any core semantic change beyond traced()+lint exemption
action_envelope.human_ratification_boundary: objective gates, anti-goal set, traced() naming/shape, frame changes, goal switching

human_ratification.evidence: user reply 'good, 5, commit as we go' 2026-07-07T~11:30Z in session 01629971; ratifies objective 10 gates, anti-goal set (5 + 10 library candidates), traced() name, execStream staged, D2 = cooperative-stop + core gaps as candidates, run store committed

decisions.d2_core_teardown: cooperative-stop pattern in example; two core gaps recorded as candidate findings for a dedicated core run
